note.en: When using [[set:husk-of-opulent-dreams]], [[weapon:serpent-spine]] stacks are prioritized over [[set:husk-of-opulent-dreams]] stacks due to their conflicting nature in gaining stacks (On-Field vs Off-Field).

Useful if you are unable to get [[stat:er]] from your substats. Does really well while passive is active, but falls of in sustained fights. Comfort option that can lose to a high refined [[weapon:whiteblind]] with stacks.
